programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man — until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappears from a strip club in East Hartford, CT. Police consider various patrons of the club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, the body of Colorado real estate developer Alan Helmick was found by his wife, Miriam, who then became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Mork & Mindy

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy eats one of Mork's gourmet delights, she turns into a wacky Orkan herself, sending her family reunion into a rollicking tizzy and treating pompous old Uncle Dave (special guest star Jonathan Winters) to a bizarre evening he won't forget.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: The joyous visit by everyone's favorite, Grandma Cora, turns to gloom when she gets mugged in the park, but Mork turns the dastardly deed into a hilarious caper when he and Grandma join forces to even the score.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, who doesn't understand why people gossip, reveals some hilarious inside scoops when he shows and tells all about his friends while subbing for Mindy as host of a local TV show called Rumor Has It.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mr. Bickley's 50th birthday celebration turns into a crazy exchange of everybody's deepest secrets, but Mindy waits until the group leaves to tell Mork somthing she's wanted to say for years.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.desc: Led by the Drednoks, gangs run wild in the streets to prevent the election of a candidate who wants to clean up the city. The gangs don't know that Cobra is funding his opponent, and the gang outbursts are calculated to ensure a landslide victory.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plans to throw the country into economic chaos! With a molecular regenerator at his fingertips, Cobra commander plans to disintegrate U.S. currency and replace it with Cobra coin. Flint, Ripcord, and Ace jump into action to help cancel these checks.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra kidnaps people with paranormal powers for a battalion of "Special Recruits," hoping to use their incredible gifts against the Joes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra attacks the U.S. treasury's printing plant, but its not money they're after. Cobra commander wants fort Knox's top-secret blueprints in order to stage the most incredible robbery of all time! That is, unless the Joes can stop this gold rush.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra mounts an attack on the oil fields of a Middle Eastern kingdom. When the Joe team responds, their skystrikers are torn apart in midair by Cobra's sonic scrambler, a soundwave device powerful enough to shatter weapons and vehicles into pieces.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In Cloud Kingdom, a realm where destinies are written, the Ninja must get the Sword of Sanctuary, a powerful relic that can see past the traps surrounding the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master – but tensions are high as Moro’s escape from the Cursed …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja now have all the items they need to get to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master but before they can figure out the last riddle that leads to the location of the tomb.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja use Ronan’s airship to travel to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master in an underwater cave under the ocean, only to find out Moro is already there.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro uses the Realm Crystal to open a portal to the Cursed Realm, ghosts take over the town - but the Ninja, in disguise, manage to get Lloyd to the center of the town and Lloyd steals the crystal…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the ghosts converge around and mobilize the Preeminent into a hulking giant behemoth, the Ninja use Airjitzu to fight the mobile beast in an attempt to slow it down.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon has been thrown into prison for a crime he did not commit. He is charged with cutting off the Little Mermaid's arm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious army steals 3 tons worth of gold under Inspector Zenigata's watch. His superiors are convinced Lupin stole the gold and holds Inspector Zenigata responsible.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has lottery fever, or to be specific, has his eyes set on the 50 million dollar jackpot. However, Lupin discovers the lottery is rigged.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.desc: 5/15/22: Hunter Greene pitches 7 and 1/3 innings without a single hit, but a crucial RBI forceout for the Pirates by Ke'Bryan Hayes in the bottom of the 8th inning gives the Pirates their one and only run leading them to an unusual 1-0 win over the Reds.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/24/22: The Mets and Giants engage in an epic back-and-forth battle for the ages, however the Mets' seven run 8th inning is not enough to keep the Giants away from the win, with Brandon Crawford walking it off with an RBI single in the 9th inning.

programme.title: MST3K: Racket Girls

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La infancia debería ser una etapa de descubrimiento lúdico y de regocijo inocente. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando las realidades del reino paranormal traspasan sus barreras y despiertan el mal verdadero?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los investigadores paranormales buscan comprender lo sobrenatural y, con frecuencia, utilizan su conocimiento para ayudar a los demás. Pero ¿qué ocurre con estos expertos cuando el objeto de sus estudios se pone contra ellos?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Incluso los lugares más inofensivos pueden guardar las cicatrices de un pasado retorcido. El mal puede perdurar a través del tiempo, puede permanecer latente hasta que alguna persona ingenua o algún inocente se crucen en su camino sin darse cuenta.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El nacimiento y la muerte son etapas naturales de la vida. Sin embargo, algunas veces la muerte no es el capítulo final. A menudo, espíritus inquietos deambulan por la tierra buscando atormentar con su furia eterna a los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ayudar a los amigos a sobrellevar los tiempos difíciles puede ser agotador, en especial cuando esa dificultad tiene que ver con una enfermedad que pone en peligro la vida.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Springfield, estado de Illinois, el Lake Club es un monumento a una época pasada: un salón de baile donde multitud de personas alguna vez prosperaron, acompañados de los sonidos del jazz clásico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los espiritistas algunas veces hablan sobre cierta región de la existencia donde los espíritus vagan libres de cuerpos materiales, y ellos la llaman “la otra vida”. En las costas de West Bay Lake, estado de Wisconsin.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La ciencia moderna nos afirma que, en el nivel más simple, el mundo material no es más que energía y que todos estamos conectados de forma física con el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los niños a menudo se encuentran a merced del mundo de los adultos y, algunas veces, se sienten incapaces de influir en el curso de sus propias existencias.

programme.title: Ataque Animal

programme.title: Ataque Animal
programme.desc: Un conservacionista desarmado escapa por poco de las fauces de un león agresivo. Un piloto dormido atrae a una hiena hambrienta y una leona renegada cambia las tornas después de que una cacería de dos días sale mal.

programme.title: Ataque Animal

programme.title: Ataque Animal

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finishes off Pica, and those below his crumbling body rush to find shelter. Meanwhile, the Tontattas finish up demolishing the SMILE Factory, and Luffy's hand is forced in his duel with Bellamy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Taking down Bellamy only enrages Luffy in his fight against Doflamingo, his anger multiplying when he finds Law's lifeless body! Meanwhile, Doflamingo takes the next step to end the game he started, which will endanger everybody in Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage draws tighter and tighter around Dressrosa, threatening to destroy all life on the island kingdom! Meanwhile, Doflamingo stands down Luffy for a final confrontation, but a surprising twist shocks everyone on the top of the Royal Palace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law's attack proves powerful - but Doflamingo's power has depths which he and Luffy haven't bargained for. When Doflamingo makes his counterattack, Luffy stares him down with an amazing power.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trebol's wrath is fully inflamed as Law summons enough energy to speak, denouncing the Doflamingo Family executives as pawns in Doflamingo's game. But Law gathers enough energy to do more than just speak out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Cavendish has to make a difficult decision when the severely wounded Law begs him to be left behind. Meanwhile, seeing even his Second Gear or Third Gear attacks aren't working against Doflamingo, Luffy decides to use his ultimate technique!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Doflamingo duke it out while the Birdcage tightens its grip on Dressrosa! Zoro sets off with a plan to stop it from slicing apart the country, while Luffy's Fourth Gear proves quite potent against Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage continues its merciless constriction, sending the residents of Dressrosa fleeing towards the center of the island, while King Riku calls out to his people: Survive long enough for Luffy to vanquish the last of the royal family.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fourth Gear gives Luffy the power he needs to head off Doflamingo at every strike! But the energy required to keep Fourth Gear going starts to take a toll on Luffy. Will he have enough left to finish the job?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bounce-man's power has drained Luffy, leaving him in need of a rest before he can reuse his Haki, but luckily the gladiators from the Colosseum have come around and are focusing on taking down Doflamingo! Sabo steps in at a crucial moment.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy and so many of the Straw Hats' allies incapacitated, victory seems inevitable for Doflamingo - but the compassion of Mansherry may be enough to turn the tide and renew their hope - to stop the Birdcage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts towards slowing down the Birdcage as it squeezes the life out of the country! Meanwhile, Viola seeks Doflamingo out herself, for a shocking confrontation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Only a bit more time remains before Luffy returns to the scene! But as time slips by, those who had been roused by Princess Mansherry's powers begin to falter! Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, is about to attack Viola!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy regains enough Haki to face off against Doflamingo, but his health is still poor. With the Birdcage closing in, is there a technique left in his repertoire that is strong enough to take down Doflamingo?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sabo recounts his surprising reunion with Luffy at the Colosseum as the Straw Hats and the others continue to recoup. Meanwhile, Fujitora gambles on how to make his next move - and the odds are in Luffy's favor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fujitora's flirting with chance has turned out poorly for the Straw Hats as the full Navy force bears down on Dressrosa searching for the pirates! Luffy and the others make a mad dash for the east port to get off the island.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca has precious little time to follow Luffy's lead and make it to Kyros. Can she make it in time? Meanwhile, Fujitora is closing in on Bartolomeo and the other Colosseum warriors while Trafalgar Law faces the shadows of his past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazon, and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Meanwhile, Fujitora uses the destruction caused by the battle in Dressrosa as a weapon, and squares off one-on-one with Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The people of Dressrosa show their appreciation to the Straw Hats one last time by foiling Fujitora's strategy. As Luffy and the others are able to finally make their break from the island, however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With newfound allies won in the battle at Dressrosa, and as the Navy watches, Luffy and the Straw Hats depart Dressrosa for open water. But will Luffy accept the oath of allegiance given by his new fleet?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: The F Word (UK)

programme.title: The F Word (UK)

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: RiffTrax: Samurai Cop
programme.desc: Decapitations, explosions, poorly subbed in stunt doubles, mangled dialogue, prominent lion heads, and unfortunate banana hammocks abound in this extremely 80s-y 90s movie. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and Alfonso Rafael Federico Sebastian for Samurai Cop!

programme.title: Robo Vampire
programme.desc: What it lacks in tradition it more than makes up for in utterly incoherent madness. There's not even a Robo Vampire and that's like the thirtieth most crazy thing in the movie Robo Vampire.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: John Travolta plays Todd Lubitch, a boy who was born without any immunities and cannot venture outside his sterile environment, lest he slip on a banana peel and end up on America's Funniest Home Videos.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 6: Brazilian Bigfoot

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 5: Animals Behaving Badly

programme.title: RiffTrax: Velvet Smooth
programme.desc: Is Velvet Smooth, a 1970s blaxploitation heroine, or a new yogurt brand full of decadent flavors? It's the former, so put down your spoons and get groovy! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Abraxas: Guardian of the Universe-
programme.desc: Abraxas, Guardian of the Universe, follows the heroic exploits of a galactic defender, played by Jesse Ventura, who comes to Earth to-wait, wait, that can't be right.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Alien Outlaw
programme.desc: Predator costumes, Lash LaRue AND his fat hillbilly sidekick buddy from The Dark Power, an alien killed with a fishing hook, what more could anyone ask for? It's time for befuddlement and laughter, join Mike, Kevin and Bill for Alien Outlaw!

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: At Your Fingertips: Floats (Live Edition)
programme.desc: This short instructs how to build a general TYPE of garbage-craft, a floating garbage craft, rather than focusing on utilizing a specific type of garbage to build a craft. This short is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: Attack Of The Supermonsters
programme.desc: When stop-motion dinosaurs meet anime superheroes, only one thing is certain: things are about to get dumb as hell! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for one of the most unique movies we've ever done, Attack of the Super Monsters!

programme.title: Best of RiffTrax: Villains

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamerica (LAS)
programme.desc: En la frontera de Brasil y Paraguay, los agentes aduaneros inspeccionan un auto sospechoso en altura, mientras la Fuerza Nacional detiene a una pareja tras encontrar marihuana y un arma blanca escondidos en su automóvil.

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX
programme.desc: Los agentes de la policía actúan contra el tráfico de drogas, las Unidades de Rescate y Emergencias médicas atienden heridos en accidentes de tránsito y tiroteos. En los puestos de alcoholemia las cosas de salen de control.

programme.title: ¡ALTO! Frontera
programme.desc: Un joven DJ que viaja a París es detenido por intentar pasar con drogas en su maleta. En Sonora, México, los oficiales detienen a un conductor que transporta drogas. AIRCOP encuentra dos piezas de motocicleta que son el envase para transportar droga.

programme.title: ¡ALTO! Frontera
programme.desc: En el aeropuerto de Bogotá detienen a un hombre que lleva drogas en su maleta y equipaje de mano. En la terminal de carga de Perú un paquete lleva libros artesanales con droga impregnada. Mercadería ilegal intenta ingresar en Brasil y Colombia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre llama a la policía para que se lleven a su agresivo compañero de cuarto. Agentes tienen que arrestar a un hombre violento en un lugar público. La policía detiene a un sospechoso sobrio, pero con problemas existenciales.

programme.title: George Carlin: Jammin' in New York
programme.desc: When George Carlin was asked which HBO concert was his favorite, his answer was always, “Jammin’ In New York.”

programme.title: George Carlin: Complaints & Grievances
programme.desc: In Complaints & Grievances, George Carlin’s 12th HBO comedy special, taped at the Beacon Theater in New York on November 17, 2001 (ten weeks after 9/11), Carlin casts his usual jaundiced eye on America and its inhabitants.

programme.title: George Carlin: It's Bad for Ya
programme.desc: It’s Bad For Ya, Carlin's Emmy-nominated 14th and final HBO special from March of 2008 features Carlin's irreverent and unapologetic observations.

programme.title: George Carlin: What Am I Doing in New Jersey?

programme.title: George Carlin: Playin' With Your Head
programme.desc: George Carlin presents one of his most hysterical stand-up comedy performances in this one-man show recorded at the Beverly Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: George Carlin: George's Best Stuff

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 visits Pangar, a planet inhabited by humans who have developed a drug that makes their immune systems perfect. Unknown to SG-1 is the means by which the drug is produced, a startling discovery that may hold the key to the origins of the Tok'ra!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Rogue NSA officers hijack the X-303 spaceship and demand that Adrian Conrad be brought to the ship. Using his Goa'uld knowledge, Conrad activates the X-303 and takes the ship light-years from Earth as O'Neill and Teal'c stage a daring rescues.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 is marooned in deep space, Thor comes to the rescue. He then seek O'Neill's help to combat the Replicators. Convinced they will attack earth if not stopped, O'Neill stages a daring mission to stop the Replicators once and for all.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 returns from a mission with an artifact that triggers the ability to see hideous yet harmless life forms in a parallel reality. As the effect spreads to civilians, O'Neill and his team must find a solution before mass hysteria breaks out.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Just as the team is beginning to lose hope, Col. Everett is sent from the Stargate Program on Earth. As Everett and the team strategize, a new battleship, the Daedalus, arrives with a new Zero Point Module, bringing with it new hope.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is saved with the arrival of Colonel Steven Caldwell, the Daedalus, and the destruction of the two approaching Wraith ships. McKay hopes the Zero Point Module will be the key to their success, meanwhile Ford seems off after an accident.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard starts to question things when strange malfunctions begin to occur after the team returns from a trip to Earth. The team discovers that the Daedalus has been infected with a Wraith Virus, causing the ship to go into survival mode.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The search for Lt. Ford leads Sheppard and Teyla to planet P3M-736 where they are captured by Ronon Dex, a man who is on the run, being hunted by the Wraith. The team offer to help Ronon, going up against the Wraith once again.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While on Planet Thenora, the team is shocked when McKay and marine officer Laura Cadman are suddenly taken aboard a Wraith Dart. When the team shoots down the Dart, they discover a technical glitch has put Cadman's consciousness in McKay's body.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team discover a planet that has cruel punishments for anyone who commits a crime; they are placed near the Stargate to be taken by the Wraith. This proves to be too effective forcing the society to put innocent folk in jail to please the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Beckett begins experimenting with a new treatment that could turn the Wraiths into humans. The team finds a young Wraith girl, who could be Beckett's first patient. Having been raised by a human, the girl is eager, and reckless, to try anything.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Todos hablan de la boda de Juan y Norma, Belinda se convierte en la informante de Dínora, quien prepara un regalo muy explosivo. Gabriela confronta a Fernando sobre la venta de la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: A sabiendas de sus planes, Rosario le pide a Dínora que incluya a Franco y Sara en su regalo de bodas. Carmela quema el traje militar que Martín usaría para llevar a Norma al altar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma sugiere cambiar la iglesia donde se hará la boda. Bajo gran tensión, Franco y Eva se empeñan en hacer un evento inolvidable, los empleados le hacen la despedida de soltero a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela mira de lejos la boda y observa cuando Dínora dispara contra la multitud, la policía persigue a la asesina y Rosario llega al lugar del suceso, Gabriela sospecha de su complicidad.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Al enterarse de lo sucedido, Norma visita a Gabriela, quien muestra su amor de madre. Dínora se interna en unos pantanos, la policía previene a los Reyes sobre posibles nuevos ataques.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando y Fernando van a la casa donde dormía Dínora para borrar pistas que los comprometan, pero se sorprenden al verla, ella jura que la misión no termina hasta acabar con sus dos objetivos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Cansada de la agitada vida nocturna de su esposo, Gabriela se sincera con Sara, quien decide vigilar de cerca a Fernando y lo sigue hasta las pesebreras, donde tiene una cita con su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara le cuenta a su madre delante de Martín lo que vio y juntas van tras Fernando hasta una casa, donde reconocen en la oscuridad a su amante, Gabriela pide un arma y discute con su hija.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gastón cuenta en su programa de radio que Antonia Guerra es la dueña del prostíbulo. Antonia hace firmar a Aníbal un documento donde pone sus bienes a nombre de ella, para protegerlos de Constanza.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Una bomba cae en San Pedro: Verónica hace circular fotos de cuando Antonia era prostituta y dueña del burdel. Alejandro se enoja con las imágenes, mientras Guerra no puede frenar los ataques en su contra. Chacón quiere colaborar con la justicia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica y Alejandro discuten fuerte y terminan. Y todo por el ataque contra la patrona Guerra. David vuelve a vivir con su abuela. Rodrigo ordena el cierre de La casa de las muñecas por el asesinato del Chopo. Antonia intenta acercarse a Alejandro.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica comprueba que espera un hijo de Alejandro y lo busca para darle la noticia, pero él se muestra tan frío que ella decide marcharse. David enfrenta a Verónica para defender a su abuela, pero ella se mantiene firme. Rodrigo interroga a Guerra.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Norma buscan a Dínora, la ven en una vergonzosa situación y ella no puede aclarar lo que pasó, atrapada en su red de mentiras. Gabriela y Fernando le echan a perder la fiesta a Martín.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín está al borde de la muerte, sus nietas lloran junto a él, porque el médico dijo que no vale la pena llevarlo al hospital, Gabriela solloza afligida, en cambio, Fernando siente alivio.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Will one team's chance at a FAST FORWARD be left blowing in the wind?

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams test their attention to detail in a round of speed dating.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are spinning their wheels in Abu Dhabi as they bogged down in the desert.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams discover the true meaning of head-to-head competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams stomach a local delicacy that leaves them slivering in their seats.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams enter a human bowling competition to help pin down a spot in the final three.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on a race around the world for one-million dollars in the premiere of the fourteenth season of The Amazing Race. The teams take off from the Los Alamitos Joint Forces Training Base near Long Beach, California.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining teams set off from their Pit Stop in Stechelberg in the Burmese Alps and receive a clue instructing them to fly to Munich, Germany and then drive to Ruhpolding, where they will ride a cable car to the top of the mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining teams set off from the Pit Stop at the Schloss Hellbrunn in Salzburg, Austria and receive a clue instructing them to travel by train to Munich and then fly 700 miles to Bucharest, Romania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams set off from the Vila Panoramic and receive a clue instructing them to fly through Moscow to Krasnoyarsk, Siberia and then travel to the hydroelectric dam depicted on the back of Russia's ten ruble note.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Having shaken off the shock of the fourth elimination, the seven remaining teams set off from their Pit Stop at the Theater of Musical Comedy in Krasnoyarsk, Siberia, Russia, and receive a clue instructing them to ride the Trans-Siberian Railway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams depart from their Pit Stop at the Siberian Colosseum, leaving the cold of Siberia and flying nearly 2,000 miles to the heat of Jaipur, India.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams set off from the Jaigur Fort in Jaipur, India and receive a clue instructing them to fly nearly 2,000 miles to Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Go on a real nature hike with Bob Ross - follow the overgrown path deep in the woods and enjoy the silent beauty of the surrounding stillness.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross's project for today is an almost feathery, tranquil landscape setting at the base of a towering mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross brings springtime to the canvas, all-around a tiny cabin set in a landscape of hazy green hills and cottony clouds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along - Bob Ross depicts the true beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stand back in the shadows with Bob Ross as the last rays of sunshine sparkle on all they touch in this lovely waterside oval on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates palm trees that yield to stiff sea breezes as a sky of ominous clouds loom in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Dry mountains, spiny shrubs and cacti, take a drive deep into the desert with Bob Ross and enjoy this fantastic oval surprise!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy a casual stroll down the pathway overlooking a quiet pond and breathe in the cool crisp fall air! Bob Ross takes you through this magnificent season.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross illustrates the illusion of infinity as mountain and water fade into the distance, created in a lovely half-oval painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join guest artist Steve Ross today -- experience the magnificence of splendid mountains and glassy lake embraced by leafy trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the warm swampy air and admire the overgrown trees with hanging Spanish moss and velvety bushes … all Bob Ross style of course!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch and learn as Bob Ross creates crashing waves in this moonlit setting - see what a simple black canvas can do.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross paints a warm and elegant snow-kissed scene with a little cabin snuggled deeply into the embrace of foothills, evergreens and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Steve Ross as he creates a lovely oval painting, a winter landscape surrounding a frozen lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A perfect oval composition! Come along with Bob Ross and see a secluded cottage with wild daisies and birch trees near a small woodland pond.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An immense ice-draped mountain is Bob Ross's main focus, with grass-covered sloping hills and chipper waterfall too!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a trail through the meadow with Bob Ross and enjoy magnificent warmth and beauty of the sunlight's glory as it rests gently upon an old barn.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A different kind of oval today! - Bob Ross paints a pretty, panoramic cold mountain lake scene inside this fun frame.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to a secluded waterfall deep in the mountains, standing tall and proud. This magnificent scene instills comfort and joy.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Breathtaking skies, bending palms, and waves accentuate the cool night breeze. A one-of-a-kind masterpiece by Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a leisurely stroll with Bob Ross and gather your thoughts in the quiet misty woodlands; this lovely masterpiece is a great lesson in using the knife.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relax with Bob Ross as the perfect picnic spot emerges from his paint filled brushes - quiet peaks on a tranquil lake and luscious green velvety grass.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an old gnarly tree and snow-capped fence to mark the line between home and the edge of the winter blanketed forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A gentle bubbling stream in the midst of the forest - Bob Ross invites you to share the serenity of Nature's escape with this delightful painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross shows you how two beautiful mountain and evergreen oval scenes can be harmonized into one memorable masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Baby Animals
programme.desc: The cuddly and rambunctious world of baby animals is always filled with fun and surprises. From orangutans and manatees to mountain gorillas, join in as Jack counts down ten moments of magic and mayhem with animal babies!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to the Florida Keys to return twin orphaned Manatees back to the wild, before visiting the Dolphin Research Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some superb simians, each with their own unique adaptations. Proboscis Monkeys, Spider Monkeys, Macaques, Mandrills, Langurs, and lots more magnificent monkeys!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wild Guides
programme.desc: Join Jack on a Wild Countdown safari to South Africa, Peru, Kenya, Borneo, and Namibia with Jack’s favorite guides leading the way to see cheetahs, lions, rhinos, pink dolphins, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he explores Chile from top to bottom! From the unique animals of the Atacama Desert to picturesque Patagonia, come along for a journey filled with South American wildlife like flamingoes, penguins, guanacos, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Stinkiest Stinkers
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he sniffs out the smelliest animals on the planet! Sloths, Tasmanian devils, sperm whales, binturongs, hyenas, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rebounding
programme.desc: Meet six amazing animals rallying from the brink of extinction. Bald eagles, American alligators, Florida manatees, Peregrine falcons and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along for a biting and stinging countdown filled with some of the world’s most venomous creatures. Komodo Dragons, Diamondback Rattlesnakes, Jellyfish, Scorpions, and Stingrays!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Born in the U.S.A
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with homegrown adventures, from right here in the ole U. S. of A! Moose, cougars, gators and even an underwater adventure from America’s 50th state!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his wife Sue as they pay a visit to the sunny state of Florida's most unique and inspirational retirement home. They meet up with an amazing couple who is spending their golden years providing a safe and peaceful retirement for horses.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's epic adventure to the Serengeti unfolds with a once-in-a-lifetime look at the great migration of wildebeest and zebra. Then Jack encounters elephants, lions, and an African rock python and he pays a visit to a local school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets up with researchers on the front-lines of animal conservation as they work to protect Elephants, Lions, Rattlesnakes, Bats and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Check out this adventure to the Atacama Desert in Chile, where Jack searches for wildlife in the most unlikely of places, and gets a first-hand look at what it's like to live in this harsh yet beautiful environment.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack encounters reptiles including an Eye Lash Viper, a huge Python, and the deadly Bushmaster at the World of Snakes. On the Caribbean coast, Jack meets an American couple who has established the Sloth Rehabilitation Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to his home state of Tennessee! He meets a one-of-a-kind farm animal living life to the fullest with a prosthetic leg, and a dedicated caregiver who's helping loads of native species get a second chance.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: After an amazing helicopter trip to the remote location, Jack goes behind-the-scenes at a trout hatchery. Then he and Sue exchange practical jokes while fly-fishing along the Sun River.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: The creatures on today’s show are some of the rarest in the wild. Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers the pink river dolphin, wooly Sichuan Takin, Fiji’s crested iguana, sun-tailed monkey and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: ack and Kathleen visit Joaquin's massive farm outside Guayaquil where he provides a haven for 45 species of animals native to Ecuador, including endangered spectacled bears, tapirs, and great green macaws.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with delicious and nutritious adventures. From carnivores like jackals, lions, and sharks to our vegetarian friends, the elephants, Jungle Jack is gearing up for a Feeding Frenzy!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's heading back to school! Join in as he meets up with the zookeepers of tomorrow at the Santa Fe Teaching Zoo in Gainesville, Fla. where he gets a lesson in training a kookaburra, shifting a trio of Galapagos tortoises, and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Seeing Red
programme.desc: Jungle Jack Hanna is seeing red in this exclusive Wild Countdown! Discover why this color is so important to the survival of these animals in their natural habitats and find out who comes out on top!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Smarts
programme.desc: Today’s animals are headed to the top of the class! Jungle Jack counts down some of nature’s most clever creatures, like dolphins, chimpanzees, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: All of the creatures on today’s countdown are livin’ large! Join Jungle Jack as he counts downs the biggest land animals on the planet – hippos, rhinos, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his grandson on safari to Tanzania's Selous Game Reserve, the largest reserve in Africa. They encounter territorial hippos, nesting crocodiles along with elephant, giraffe, impala and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wickedly Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along if you dare as Jungle Jack is counting down hair-raising true stories from the sea, land and air! Face-to-face encounters with bats, caiman, snakes, plus real dragons, on this Wickedly Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, Jack gets behind the wheel to experience “The Wilds,” the largest zoological reserve in North America.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along for some epic Hanna family adventures like game ranger training in South Africa, babysitting a wombat in Tasmania, trekking with mandrills in Gabon, a horseback safari through Montana and a trip to meet some donkeys in Arizona!

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Ant and Dec take on a beginner's guide to Japanese cooking.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Comedian Rob Beckett helps create an all-you-can-eat Chinese buffet. Jamie makes a melt-in-your-mouth pie. And, Jimmy takes Friday night nibbles to another level with potato spirals and stuffed jalapeños wrapped in bacon.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie cooks for his former band, Scarlet Division.

programme.desc: Jamie hosts afternoon tea for his grandmother and her friends.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie shares his clever shortcuts for a prosciutto-wrapped roasted pork filet served with a cheesy gnocchi gratin, then whips up a prawn curry that's both easy to make and impressive, perfect with his giant crispy rice cake.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a risotto, a seven-veggie sauce, and an egg-free chocolate cake, proving that it is not difficult to create great dishes from the simplest ingredients.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs a walkway with fieldstone. Tom shows Kevin how to recognize a quality cabinet and kitchen island. A bathroom gets new black and white tile. Norm boxes in the sunroom ceiling beams.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: New wireless security systems, marble kitchen-window stool, granite countertops and "His and hers" closets are installed. We see the high-efficiency HVAC system. Tom shows a new "smart lock”.

programme.desc: Norm wrestles with creative details. The stucco system starts on the addition. Kevin sees California modern architecture. Norm shows a formaldehyde-free batt insulation. Kevin meets a tile specialist.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1930s floors are matched with red oak and walnut. The new back terrace, with corbels and tile, is constructed. We see attractive low water plants. Kevin gets a close look at the Hollywood sign.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kitchen cabinets, soapstone countertops, an archway, and a coved ceiling are installed. Richard helps with a pedestal sink. The Juliette balcony and decorative iron balustrade are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new custom garage door blends with the period of the house. The front gates are installed. Kevin shows the front yard, hardware, and light fixtures, then visits a spectacular Spanish style house.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.desc: Jack and Terri believe that Janet is trying to seduce Furley's shy nephew.

programme.desc: Instead of catching sleep in the dingy apartment above his restaurant, Jack catches Mr. Angelino with a young woman.

programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.
